description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Favorite three English commercial voiceover demos under 30 seconds
tasks.description: On the voiceover demos page, filter to English commercial demos under 30 seconds and add the first three results to your Favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Voiceover" item in the main navigation menu.
On the Voiceover page, click the "Demos" tab if it is not already selected.
In the category filter, select "Commercial" from the dropdown or pill options.
In the language filter, select "English" as the only active language.
In the duration filter controls, set the maximum length to 0:30 (30 seconds) using the slider or max-duration field.
In the results list that appears, for each of the first three demos shown from top to bottom, click its Play button once and then click its "Add to Favorites" (heart) icon.

tasks.name: Select the higher-rated character voice demo with at least 10 reviews
tasks.description: Within character voice demos, compare the first two qualifying demos (rating ≥ 4.5 stars and 10+ reviews) and add the one with the higher rating to your project shortlist.
steps: From any page, click the "Voiceover" navigation item and then select the "Character" subcategory.
In the style filter, choose "Video Game / Animation" as the character style.
In the rating filter, select "4.5 stars & up" as the minimum rating.
In the sort dropdown above the results, choose "Rating – High to Low".
In the results list, identify the first two demos that display a "10+ reviews" badge and click the title of the first one to open its detail page.
Note the star rating displayed for this first demo, then use the browser Back button or the breadcrumb link to return to the filtered results list.
Click the title of the second demo (the next one with a "10+ reviews" badge) to open its detail page.

Compare the star rating shown for this second demo with the rating you noted for the first demo, and decide which demo has the higher rating (or, if they are tied, choose the one with the longer listed running time).
On the detail page of the chosen demo, click the "Add to Project Shortlist" button.

tasks.name: Add two recent drama acting showreels to a casting list
tasks.description: On the acting showreels page, filter to drama showreels filmed in 2019 or later with a duration of at least 1 minute, and add two different showreels to the Casting List.
steps: Navigate to the homepage and click the "Acting" item in the main navigation.
On the Acting page, click the "Showreels" tab.
In the genre filter, select "Drama" and deselect any other genres.
In the "Year filmed" filter, set the minimum year to 2019.
In the duration filter, set the minimum length to 1:00 (1 minute) using the slider or min-duration field.
In the sort dropdown above the showreel grid, select "Most Recent First".
Click the thumbnail or title of the first showreel in the filtered list to open its detail page, then click the "Add to Casting List" button.

Use the "Next" showreel button (or return to the filtered list and choose the next item) to open a second, different drama showreel that matches the filters, and click the "Add to Casting List" button for that showreel as well.

tasks.name: Request a quote for a 60-second online ad that stays within a $600 budget
tasks.description: Use the rate calculator to configure a 60-second online ad voiceover. Adjust the usage duration if needed so the displayed estimate is $600 or less, then send this configuration via the inquiry form.
steps: From the main navigation, click the "Rates" or "Pricing" link to open the rates page.
Scroll to the "Instant Quote Calculator" section and click inside the "Project Type" dropdown.
Select "Online Ad / Web Commercial" as the project type.
In the script length or duration control, set the length to 60 seconds (for example, by typing "60" into a seconds field or moving the slider to 0:60).
In the "Usage duration" dropdown, first select "12 months" and in the "Territory" or "Usage area" dropdown select "Online – Worldwide".
If the calculator shows an estimated fee greater than $600 for this configuration, change the "Usage duration" selection from "12 months" to "6 months" while keeping the other fields the same.
Click the "Copy this quote to inquiry form" or similarly labeled button beneath the estimate.
When the inquiry form appears, type "Casting Producer" into the Name field and "producer@example.com" into the Email field.
In the "Project details" or "Message" textarea, type "Requesting a 60-second online ad voiceover quote as configured in the calculator, staying within a $600 budget."
Click the "Send Inquiry" or "Submit" button at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Submit a booking request for a 2-hour directed remote session on a specific date
tasks.description: Complete the booking form to request a directed remote recording session lasting 2 hours on April 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM in the America/New_York time zone, with two preferred connection methods.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Contact / Booking" link in the main navigation.
On the contact page, select the "Booking Request" tab or option if multiple form types are available.
In the "Session type" dropdown, choose "Directed remote recording session".
In the "Session length" dropdown or field, select "2 hours".
Click the date picker field and choose April 15, 2026 from the calendar.
In the time field or dropdown, select "10:00 AM" as the session start time.
In the time zone selector, choose "America/New_York (UTC-5)" as the time zone.
In the "Preferred connection" options, check both "Source-Connect" and "Zoom" as preferred platforms.
In the "Additional details" textarea, type "If 10:00 AM is unavailable, a backup time is 2:00 PM the same day."
Click the "Submit Booking Request" button to send the form.

tasks.name: Save three recent advertising-agency testimonials to your favorite clients list
tasks.description: Filter testimonials to advertising/marketing agencies from 2022 onward, open the first three, and add each to the Favorite Clients list.
steps: From any page, click the "Clients & Testimonials" item in the main navigation.
In the "Client type" filter, select "Advertising / Marketing Agency" and deselect other types.
In the "Year" or "Date" filter, set the starting year to 2022 so that only testimonials from 2022 and later are shown.
Scroll to the testimonials list and click "Read more" on the first testimonial in the filtered results to expand its full content.
In the expanded view, click the "Add client to Favorites" or star icon associated with that testimonial.
Close or collapse the expanded testimonial, then repeat the "Read more" and "Add client to Favorites" actions for the second and third testimonials in the filtered list.
After favoriting three testimonials, click the "Favorite Clients" or "Favorites" tab or button on the same page.
In the Favorites view, click the "Sort by Company Name (A–Z)" option in the sort dropdown.

tasks.name: Create a project plan with combined services totaling no more than 3 recording hours
tasks.description: Use the Project Planner to combine a commercial voiceover service and an on-camera self-tape service, adjusting the on-camera option if necessary so the planner shows a total duration of 3 hours or less, then save the plan.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Project Planner" or "Plan Your Project" link in the main navigation.
On the planner page, click the "New Project" button and type "VO + Acting Pilot" into the Project Title field.
In the Voiceover Services section, check the box for "Commercial voiceover – up to 60 seconds (1 hour session)" and leave its quantity at 1.
In the Acting Services section, check the box for "On-camera self-tape – 2 scenes (2 hours session)" and leave its quantity at 1.
Look at the planner's total duration indicator; if it shows more than 3 hours, change the Acting Services selection from "2 scenes (2 hours session)" to "1 scene (1 hour session)" instead.
In the Budget field, type "Maximum budget: $900".
In the Notes or Instructions textarea, type "If schedule is tight, prioritize recording the commercial voiceover first."
Click the "Save Project Plan" button to store this configuration.

tasks.name: Subscribe to monthly updates focused on commercial voiceover, animation, and drama acting
tasks.description: Use the newsletter form to subscribe with a specific email address, selecting interests in commercial voiceover, animation, and drama acting, and choosing a monthly summary frequency without weekly emails.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Scroll to the footer area until you see the newsletter signup form.
Click in the Email field and type "casting.researcher@example.com".
Click the "Areas of interest" multi-select or checkbox list and select "Commercial voiceover", "Animation", and "Drama acting" as your interests.
In the "Email frequency" dropdown, choose "Monthly summary" as the delivery frequency.
If a "Weekly tips" or more frequent option is pre-selected, click to uncheck or deselect that option so that only the monthly summary will be sent.
Check the box labeled "Send me casting availability updates" or similar, if available.
Click the "Subscribe" or "Join Newsletter" button to submit the form.
